evidence_gaps: No raw entry contains the canonical NEU-DET, GC10-DET, or Severstal steel defect dataset metadata; only NEU-DET is referenced indirectly via Marfbin repo.
No raw entry is the original YOLOv8 paper (Ultralytics, Jocher et al.); student must fetch it separately for the primary baseline architecture.
No raw entry reports benchmark mAP numbers on NEU-DET/GC10-DET for YOLOv8 variants; quantitative comparison table must be assembled by the student.
